candidate.description: Replace exact phrase matching with OR expansion and prefix wildcards for terms >= 3 characters.
candidate.rationale: Exact phrase matching fails on 19 of 30 queries because multi-word topics rarely appear as contiguous phrases. OR expansion with selective prefix wildcards matches individual term occurrences and morphological variants without requiring word order.
candidate.expected_improvements: Multi-word topic queries like "autoresearch projects ranked" or "deployment issues" should now match messages containing any of these terms or their variants, fixing most of the 19 currently failing queries while maintaining precision through BM25's multi-term relevance scoring.
candidate.unified_diff:
--- a/engine/server.py
+++ b/engine/server.py
@@ -147,18 +147,18 @@
 # QUERY FUNCTIONS — shared by REST endpoints and MCP tools
 # =============================================================
 
 def _auto_phrase(q: str) -> str:
-    """Wrap bare multi-token queries in quotes so BM25 ranks positional
-    phrase matches instead of bag-of-words token density. Callers passing
-    explicit FTS5 syntax (quotes, booleans, NEAR, prefix*, column filters,
-    grouping) pass through unchanged. Also makes hyphenated tokens work
-    without requiring callers to quote them themselves."""
+    """Expand bare queries with OR operator and prefix matching to support
+    topic-based searches while passing through explicit FTS5 syntax unchanged."""
     if not q or any(c in q for c in '"*():^'):
         return q
     tokens = q.split()
     if any(op in tokens for op in ("AND", "OR", "NOT", "NEAR")):
         return q
-    return f'"{q}"'
+    if len(tokens) == 1:
+        return f"{tokens[0]}*" if len(tokens[0]) >= 3 else tokens[0]
+    expanded = [f"{t}*" if len(t) >= 3 else t for t in tokens]
+    return " OR ".join(expanded)
 
 
 def query_search(q: str, limit: int = 20, type: str = None, workspace_id: str = None):

verdict.retrieval_reason: MRR delta +0.2272 with 11 improved and 1 regressed query; all metrics improve substantially across multiple categories.
verdict.minimalism_reason: Net-zero lines, modifies existing function in-place with clean list comprehension; no new dependencies or abstractions.
verdict.reliability_reason: Preserves FTS5 passthrough, handles edge cases correctly, no new failure modes; minor whitespace-only edge case pre-existed.
verdict.taste_reason: Precise description naming exact mechanism, clean pythonic code matching existing style, no anti-pattern words detected.
